prompt:
Analyze the following text and extract ALL temporal information.

For each date or time reference found, provide:
- The date string (in YYYY-MM-DD format when possible)
- A Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) if the date is specific enough
- A brief context describing what the date refers to

For intervals (e.g. "from 2016 to 2019", "between March and June"), provide:
- start and end timestamps
- context

Also determine the overall time span of the text:
- start_ts: earliest date mentioned (as Unix timestamp)
- end_ts: latest date mentioned (as Unix timestamp)

Text:
"""[11:01 am on 17 December, 2022] Maria said: "Hey John! Long time no see! What's up?"
[11:01 am on 17 December, 2022] John said: "Hey Maria! Good to see you. Just got back from a family road trip yesterday, it was fun! Anything exciting happening for you?"
[11:01 am on 17 December, 2022] Maria said: "Been busy volunteering at the homeless shelter and keeping fit. Just started doing aerial yoga, it's great. Have you tried any other cool workout classes?"
[11:01 am on 17 December, 2022] John said: "Woah, Maria, that sounds cool! I'm doing kickboxing and it's giving me so much energy."
[11:01 am on 17 December, 2022] Maria said: "Cool, John. Kickboxing is a perfect way to stay in shape and de-stress. Do you have any goals you're working towards?"
[11:01 am on 17 December, 2022] John said: "Yeah Maria, I'm really hoping to get into local politics. I love helping the community and making it a better place."
[11:01 am on 17 December, 2022] Maria said: "Woohoo, John! That's awesome! Any specific areas you want to tackle?"
[11:01 am on 17 December, 2022] John said: "I'm passionate about improving education and infrastructure in our community. Those are my main focuses."
[11:01 am on 17 December, 2022] Maria said: "Wow, John! It's great to hear that. Could you tell me what got you interested in those topics?"
[11:01 am on 17 December, 2022] John said: "Growing up, I saw how lack of education and crumbling infrastructure affected my neighborhood. I don't want future generations to go through that, so I think schools and infrastructure should be funded properly. Here's a pic of a school last year, after they got the funding."
[11:01 am on 17 December, 2022] Maria said: "Looks good! How did the extra funding help with building the school?"
[11:01 am on 17 December, 2022] John said: "It enabled needed repairs and renovations, making the learning environment safer and more modern for students."
[11:01 am on 17 December, 2022] Maria said: "Wow John, it really made a difference for schools and students! It must have been great to be involved. What's your next move in politics?"
[11:01 am on 17 December, 2022] John said: "I'm gonna chat with local leaders and organizations, get support and gather ideas for my next move."
[11:01 am on 17 December, 2022] Maria said: "Sounds good, John. Let's get support and great ideas from local leaders and organizations. Keep me posted on how your campaign is going."
[11:01 am on 17 December, 2022] John said: "Got it! Thanks, Maria. I definitely will.""""

Return JSON:
```json
{{
    "dates": [
        {{
            "date_str": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "timestamp": <unix timestamp as float or null>,
            "context": "brief description of what this date refers to"
        }}
    ],
    "intervals": [
        {{
            "start_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "end_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "start_ts": <unix timestamp as float>,
            "end_ts": <unix timestamp as float>,
            "context": "brief description"
        }}
    ],
    "start_ts": <earliest unix timestamp or null>,
    "end_ts": <latest unix timestamp or null>
}}
```

If no temporal information is found, return empty lists and null timestamps.

JSON Output: /no_think
